hook_en: Hold to charge a donut launcher; release in the sweet spot for a perfect arc, overshoot and the donut detonates on the pad.
hook_ru: Удерживай заряд пончикомёта; отпусти в нужный момент для идеальной дуги — перебрал, и пончик взрывается на платформе.
mechanic: 2D side-view canvas; hold-and-release charge meter strobes GREEN→YELLOW→RED→DANGER; release zone scoring; 3 lives; clear ring quotas per level.

design.non_timer_pressure: lives (3 strikes) + ring quota per level
controls: mouse hold / touch hold to charge
design.lose_condition: lives <= 0 (overshoot, undershoot, or pad detonation in DANGER zone)
design.win_condition: clear all 5 levels by hitting each level's ring quota
